revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24618454543|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:青海神社 (加茂市)]] {{Expand Japanese|青海神社 (加茂市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Aomi Shrine | native_name = 青海神社 | image = Aomi Jinja (Kamo City) haiden.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Aomi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|37.656662|139.053621}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | website = {{Official website|https://www.aomi-jinjya.or.jp/}} }} {{nihongo|'''Aomi Shrine'''|青海神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11636502|ltq=Q11636502|qid=Q11636502|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province}} * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province|ja|越後国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11636502|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province}} ** Series ordinal: 30 ** P155: {{ill|Q11478109|ltq=Q11478109|qid=Q11478109|1=Kawai Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135040457|ltq=Q135040457|qid=Q135040457|1=Utsurahashino Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Kamo, Niigata|lt=Kamo|ar|كامو (نييغاتا)|azb|کامو، نیقاتا|ceb|Kamo (lungsod sa Hapon)|ce|Камо (Ниигата)|cs|Kamo (Niigata)|de|Kamo (Niigata)|en|Kamo, Niigata|es|Kamo (Niigata)|fa|کامو، نیگاتا|fi|Kamo (Niigata)|fr|Kamo (Niigata)|gl|Kamo|id|Kamo, Niigata|it|Kamo|ja|加茂市|ko|가모시|ms|Kamo, Niigata|mzn|کامو، نیگاتا|nl|Kamo (Niigata)|pl|Kamo|pt|Kamo|ro|Kamo|ru|Камо (Ниигата)|sv|Kamo, Niigata|tg|Камо|tl|Kamo, Niigata|tr|Kamo, Niigata|tt|Камо (Ниигата)|uk|Камо (Ніїґата)|uz|Kamo (Niigata)|vi|Kamo, Niigata|war|Kamo, Niigata|zh_classical|加茂市|zh_min_nan|Kamo-chhī|zh_yue|加茂|zh|加茂市|qid=Q857293|1=Kamo, Niigata}} * {{ill|Q666514|ltq=Q666514|qid=Q666514|1=Echigo Province}} * {{ill|Q11621281|ltq=Q11621281|qid=Q11621281|1=Kanbara district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|37.656662|139.053621}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == official website (P856) == * https://www.aomi-jinjya.or.jp/ ** Language of work: {{ill|Q5287|ltq=Q5287|qid=Q5287|1=Japanese language}} == image (P18) == * Aomi Jinja (Kamo City) haiden.jpg == OpenCorporates ID (P1320) == * jp/4110005006003 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182448 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == legal form (P1454) == * {{ill|religious corporation|lt=religious corporation|ja|宗教法人|qid=Q7311343|1=religious corporation}}https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あおみじんじゃhttps://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == postal code (P281) == * 959-1300https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4110005006003 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135040456|ltq=Q135040456|qid=Q135040456|1=Awomino Shrine (Q135040456)}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '新潟県加茂市大字加茂229', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:青海神社 (加茂市)]] {{wikidata link|Q112923996}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Aomi Shrine |Image = [[File:Aomi Jinja (Kamo City) haiden.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Niigata Prefecture|Q132705|qid=Q132705|1=Niigata Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kamo City|Q857293|qid=Q857293|1=Kamo, Niigata}} Ōaza Kamo 229 |Coordinates = {{Coord|37|39|24.0|N|139|3|13.6|E|region:JP-15_scale:10000_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|lt=Shiine-tsuhiko|Q11120574|qid=Q11120574|lt=Shiine-tsuhiko no Mikoto|1=Saonetsuhiko}}, {{ill|lt=Kunitama|Q9692242|qid=Q9692242|lt=Ōkunitama no Mikoto|1=Kunitama}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo Wake-ikazuchi no Mikoto|Q11634943|qid=Q11634943|1=Kamo-wake-ikazuchi-no-Kami}}, {{ill|lt=Tamayori-hime|Q56344982|qid=Q56344982|lt=Tadasu Tamayori-hime no Mikoto|1=Tamayori-hime}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo Takekakumi no Mikoto|Q11634939|qid=Q11634939|1=Kamotaketsunumi no Mikoto}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Prefectural Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} |Founded = {{ill|lt=Jinki era|Q1373210|qid=Q1373210|1=Jinki (era)}} 3 ({{ill|lt=726|Q23555|qid=Q23555|1=726}}) |Main hall = |Alternative names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Niigata|label=Aomi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Aomi Shrine''' (あおみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Kamo City|Q857293|qid=Q857293|1=Kamo, Niigata}}, {{ill|lt=Niigata Prefecture|Q132705|qid=Q132705|1=Niigata Prefecture}}. The surrounding area forms {{ill|lt=Kamo-yama Park|Q68013407|qid=Q68013407|1=Kamoyama Park}}. === History === The shrine was founded in {{ill|lt=726|Q23555|qid=Q23555|1=726}} ({{ill|lt=Jinki era|Q1373210|qid=Q1373210|1=Jinki (era)}} 3). Its origin dates to when the Aomi chiefs, who developed the local Aomi-go area, established a shrine to enshrine various deities beginning with their ancestral god, {{ill|lt=Shiine-tsuhiko|Q11120574|qid=Q11120574|lt=Shiine-tsuhiko no Mikoto|1=Saonetsuhiko}}[https://www.aomi-jinjya.or.jp/history/yuisyo.html Historical Chronology] Aomi ShrineEditorial Committee for Historical Walks of Niigata Prefecture, ed., *Historical Walks of Niigata Prefecture (Historical Walks 15)*, Yamakawa Shuppansha, 2009, pp. 126–127. Between the worship hall and the shrine office is a {{ill|lt=nightingale floor|Q1471563|qid=Q1471563|1=Nightingale floor}} {{ill|lt=corridor|Q1135449|qid=Q1135449|1=Hallway}}. It was built in {{ill|lt=1757|Q7635|qid=Q7635|1=1757}} ({{ill|lt=Hōreki era|Q1194397|qid=Q1194397|1=Hōreki}} 7) by {{ill|lt=Mizoguchi Naoharu|Q11564473|qid=Q11564473|1=Mizoguchi Naoatsu}}, the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=daimyō|1=UNKNOWN}} of the {{ill|lt=Shibata Domain|Q1040856|qid=Q1040856|1=Shibata Domain}} at the time. === Cultural properties === *Aomi Shrine precinct sutra mound excavated artifacts (Designated Cultural Property of Niigata Prefecture, designated March 29, 1962)[https://www.pref.niigata.lg.jp/uploaded/life/472403_1189603_misc.pdf List of Designated Cultural Properties, etc.] Niigata Prefecture *Aomi Shrine buildings (Designated Cultural Property of Kamo City, designated January 12, 1975)[https://www.city.kamo.niigata.jp/docs/30129.html Aomi Shrine buildings] Kamo City *Furukawa family documents (Designated Cultural Property of Kamo City, designated January 12, 1975)[https://www.city.kamo.niigata.jp/docs/30130.html Furukawa family documents] Kamo City *Site of the zelkova tree planted by an imperial envoy (Designated Historic Site of Kamo City, designated January 12, 1975)[https://www.city.kamo.niigata.jp/docs/30136.html Site of the zelkova tree planted by an imperial envoy] Kamo City *Okina Cedar (Designated Natural Monument of Kamo City, designated January 12, 1975)[https://www.city.kamo.niigata.jp/docs/30137.html Okina Cedar] Kamo City === Access === *An 8-minute walk from {{ill|lt=Kamo Station (Niigata Prefecture)|Q6358928|qid=Q6358928|lt=Kamo Station|1=Kamo Station (Niigata)}}. === Notes === {{Notes help}} {{Reflist|2}} === References === *Editorial Committee for Historical Walks of Niigata Prefecture, ed., *Historical Walks of Niigata Prefecture (Historical Walks 15)*, Yamakawa Shuppansha, 2009 === External links === *[https://www.aomi-jinjya.or.jp/ Official website of Aomi Shrine (childbearing, safe childbirth, child protection)] {{Pref-stub|pref=Niigata Prefecture}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == Niigata Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kamo]] [[Category:Buildings in Kamo]] [[Category:新潟県の旧県社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Echigo Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Niigata Prefecture]]
